acceptance_tests: T1 pack loads into the INSTALLED dep: npm pack cael-os-light -> install tarball in packs/p1-rbac -> pack loader accepts p1 pack (threshold_derivations with real derivation evidence from the field, entity/state declarations, receipt schemas, scored-surface bindings p1_answer) and REFUSES the malformed variants

T2 L1 REAL-CORPUS proof (local, uncommitted data): with CAEL_P1_DATA_ROOT set, the self-harness scores the 50-row Public_Evaluation: permission >=49/50 (P035 the allowed miss, never patched) AND expected_document_id scored on Allow rows + audit-channel Deny rows; score REPORT committed (numbers + row ids only), corpus NOT

T3 zero-leak battery: deny rows produce generic id-free user refusals; audit records carry resolved ids; string-level leak scan over user-channel outputs vs Restricted/Confidential doc ids + titles = zero hits; abstention floor holds (P007 decoy)
T4 synthetic fixture suite green offline (mini-corpus fixtures mirroring the archetype-A battery incl. multi-doc deny-if-any, canonicalization, cross-block classification)

T5 track_port_manifest.v1 for P1 validates; showcase renders /client/track page from manifest+content in project-label mode (no real client name; permission gate respected); judge-requirements rows filled from the P1 brief (their requirement -> our understanding -> how Cael OS achieves it -> our solution on top -> evidence ref)

T6 showcase.replay.v1 artifact generated from a REAL L1 run with public_scope=internal + redaction fields present; player renders it in the internal mode; W4 diff-test still green (gallery side content-only)

T7 receipts validate every turn (decision, firing_rule, cited_ids UNION for multi-doc, confidence, escalation_used, pack_id, image_sha); graded-cooper: ordinary rows zero second-brain calls, P035-class residual + Restricted-attempt rows fire the escalation trigger visibly

T8 scans: zero client-data bodies (rg for content_vi markers + known doc-title strings = empty), zero secrets, suite green from cold clone offline; BUILD cooper record before ready (park-on-MAIN fallback allowed with ready-note)

evidence_refs: LOCKED cooper-hardened design (identify-then-gate, dual-channel) + F1-F12 implementation rules: docs/handoff/jobs/_briefs/cael-os-light-AGREEMENT-DRAFT-1.md section 5

Verified field: 40 docs (8 dept x 5, ~20-25K tokens = whole corpus fits one context window, NO vector DB); RBAC matrix scores 49/50 (P035 = provable metadata ceiling); retrieval/doc-id accuracy is the real battleground: docs/handoff/jobs/_briefs/cael-os-light-P1-FIELD-PREP.md

Independent refutation cooper confirmed 12 findings; load-bearing: F1 deny-row doc-id-vs-leak (dual channel: audit record carries id, user gets id-free refusal), F2 abstention floor, F3 classification-gate-not-block, F6 score doc-id not just permission

execution_plan.goal_step: Build the gated identify/route index: strip shared boilerplate, index the 40 docs' section-3 atomic facts + titles (NOT full-doc embeddings, per F9); resolve the true target doc(s) across ALL docs
execution_plan.verify: identify returns the correct expected_document_id on the Allow rows of the 50-eval

execution_plan.goal_step: Deterministic gate: classification x role/dept across ALL blocks (F3), canonical dept-name normalization HR<->Human Resources (F4), MAX-restrictiveness for cross-doc facts (F11), credential from the eval row not a Users-join (F10), Executive-only privilege
execution_plan.verify: permission >=49/50 on the 50-eval; P035 left as the ceiling, never special-cased (F5)

execution_plan.goal_step: Dual-channel output: ALLOW -> load full cited section, ground the answer, UNION multi-doc ids (F7), keep polarity/number from the full section (F8). DENY -> audit record carries the resolved target id (F1) + the user gets a GENERIC id-free refusal; abstention floor refuses rather than answering a visible near-duplicate (F2)
execution_plan.verify: zero Restricted content/existence leaks; a generic refusal on all 7 deny rows; deny-row doc-id captured only in the audit channel

execution_plan.goal_step: Self-harness scores BOTH permission AND expected_document_id (F6); keep classification-vocabulary out of the content-retrieval namespace (F12); generalize, never overfit the 50 public rows (a Hidden_Evaluation exists)
execution_plan.verify: self-scored on the full 50-eval before submission; retrieval/doc-id measured, not just permission

hard_rejects: building against cael-os-light SOURCE: the pack imports the INSTALLED @cael/os-light tarball dep (npm pack from the merged tree; dogfood law); any cael-os-light/** edit = red

client data in the repo: no content_vi bodies, no corpus rows, no xlsx, no user directory data anywhere in the diff; runtime reads CAEL_P1_DATA_ROOT (Downloads path) only; committed fixtures are SYNTHETIC
P035 special-cased anywhere (F5: fixing it flips ~8 rows; hidden eval exists); public 49/50 reported as public scope, never as hidden expectation
grading via Users-sheet join (eval rows are self-contained; U003 conflict documented); dept compare without canonicalization (F4)
answer path bypassing the gate; UI in scoring path; prose-parsed routing; replay artifact with public_scope=approved (stays internal pending Kajima permission)
secrets/keys in repo; writes outside the fence; markdown cooper record; self-judge-close; foreground full-suite runs

inspect_before_merge: lane source delta confined to: packs/p1-rbac/** (NEW pack root) + showcase/content/** + showcase manifest registration + docs/handoff/jobs/<lane jobs>/** + lane-normal goal/lane state; ZERO writes to cael-os-light/**, cael.agent.os/** hooks/canon, v3/**, boot artifacts
T2 real-corpus score report present with >=49/50 + doc-id table; NO corpus content in the diff (judge re-scans)
zero-leak battery evidence + receipts samples in the lane report; BUILD cooper record attached or MAIN-parked
port manifest valid; gallery diff content-only beyond the manifest registration
